content: Our company policy allows for 20 days of paid time off per year.
Employees can work from home up to 3 days a week with manager approval.
The health insurance plan covers dental and vision checkups twice a year.
Expenses over $50 require a receipt for reimbursement.
The annual performance review happens every December.
Our office is located at 123 Tech Lane, San Francisco.
The company provides a $500 annual stipend for professional development.
Security badges must be worn at all times while in the building.
Internal job openings are posted on the company portal every Friday.
Maternity leave is 12 weeks fully paid for all full-time employees.
Passwords must be updated every 90 days and follow complexity requirements.
Company laptops are eligible for replacement every three years.
Payroll is processed bi-monthly on the 15th and 30th of each month.
Our mission is to empower innovation through collaborative and sustainable technology.
Employees are entitled to 10 days of paid sick leave per calendar year.
Use of the company VPN is mandatory for all remote work activities.
The company matches 401k contributions up to 4% of the employee's salary.
Core working hours are from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM for all departments.
Complimentary coffee, tea, and healthy snacks are provided in the breakroom.
Full-time employees can access the onsite gym for a $10 monthly maintenance fee.
Bereavement leave of 3 days is provided for the loss of immediate family members.
All visitors must register at the front desk and be escorted by an employee.
Requests for new software licenses must be submitted through the IT ticket portal.
Corporate travel should be booked in economy class for flights under 6 hours.
Corporate credit cards are issued to employees at the Director level and above.
